obverse.description: Crowned king standing right, holding scepter with right hand; the other hand is near sword pommel. Figure of the king is partially within a rope circle with legend and date outside.
obverse.lettering_translation: Christian (IV, King of) Denmark by the grace of God
obverse.picture_copyright: Fritz Rudolf Künker GmbH & Co. KG, Osnabrück und Lübke + Wiedemann KG, Leonberg

reverse.description: Ornate flat-topped shield with arms on Denmark is above long arms cross. The Crown of Denmark is above the shield, inside the upper arm of cross. Shield is also inside a rope circle with legend outside, cut in four parts by cross arms.
reverse.lettering_translation: King of Norway, the Wends and the Goths
reverse.picture_copyright: Fritz Rudolf Künker GmbH & Co. KG, Osnabrück und Lübke + Wiedemann KG, Leonberg
